# Agent guidance lives in AGENTS.md

This file exists for backwards compatibility with GitHub Copilot, which looks up
`.github/copilot-instructions.md` by name. The canonical instructions — project
layout, build/test cheat sheet, feature matrix, rayon discipline, and the full
AMem (fso-amem MCP) governance block — live in [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at
the repo root.
